title: Hordr Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub Hordr (Home1 As Integer, Home2 As Integer, Home3 As Integer, Home4 As Integer, Home5 As Integer, Home6 As Integer [, Home7 As Integer] [, Home8 As Integer] [, Home9 As Integer])
parameters:
Home1 - 9	Bit pattern that tells which axes should home during each step of the Home process.

Any number of axes between 0 to all axes may home during the 1st step.

Home 7 - 9 can be specified when R, S, or T axis is specified.
description: Specifies the order of the axes returning to their HOME positions.
see_also:
Home

HomeSet

Mcordr

Hordr Example

VB Example:

m_spel.Hordr(2, 13, 0, 0, 0, 0)

C# Example:

m_spel.Hordr(2, 13, 0, 0, 0, 0);
